title: Product manifest
description: Desired state for one Swagger Portal product. Field limits mirror the Portal API's own schema, verified against swaggerhub-portal-api 0.2.0-beta, so that a violation fails at plan time rather than as a 400 part-way through an apply.

description.description: Portal API caps this at 110 characters.

slug.description: Identity anchor (A.7). Changing it declares a new product and orphans the old one. Portal API caps product slugs at 22 characters.

hidden.description: Retirement in MVP1 is hidden: true, not deletion (A.8, B.9).

owner.description: No Portal API footprint. Generates CODEOWNERS (A.10).

order.description: Relative sequence only. Normalised before comparison, because the portal is 0-based and does not guarantee it preserves these integers.

name.description: Mutable attribute. Changing it is an update in place, not a create (A.7).

slug.description: Identity, scoped to parent. Changing it creates a new entry and orphans the old (A.7).

contentUrl.description: Repo-relative path for markdown/html, absolute SwaggerHub URL for apiUrl.

parent.description: Slug of another entry in this manifest. Absent for top-level entries.
